fields.description:
## Context
Parked from epic heedless-caloric-pikeperch (d6a0) plan-review. The epic's success criteria mentioned 'LLM gates fail closed on unreadable config' but no child implemented it. src/rebar/llm/config.py:_read_llm_file_table currently degrades to env-only on _root_config.ConfigError (a broken pyproject/rebar.toml silently yields env-only LLM config rather than surfacing). 'Fail closed' would invert this to raise/block.

## Why parked (not implemented here)
This is a behaviour inversion (a one-way door): callers depending on the current fail-open/env-only fallback would change semantics, so it needs its own design + rollback decision (ADR) rather than being smuggled into the timeout-wiring child (02cd). Out of scope for the audit-remediation stacked change.

## Acceptance Criteria (when promoted)
- [ ] Decision recorded (ADR) on fail-open vs fail-closed for unreadable LLM config, incl. which config paths count as 'unreadable' and the rollback path
- [ ] _read_llm_file_table surfaces a structured error/verdict instead of silent env-only degrade
- [ ] Regression test for the unreadable-config path
